title: Self-hosted Sentry server with a token and host env is REVIEW

origin.description: Public documentation config from getsentry/sentry-mcp (README.md (self-hosted)). Content verbatim; only normalized to a valid JSON root. Upstream placeholders preserved.

humanExpectation.rationale: The access token is a secret to review and the npx package is unpinned; SENTRY_HOST is a hostname, not a credential, and must not be flagged as a secret.
knownLimitations: SENTRY_HOST is a configuration value; only SENTRY_ACCESS_TOKEN matches the credential heuristic.
